nodes.name: Dicaeum
nodes.summary: Dicaeum（Dicaeum）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如眼鏡啄花鳥、金腰啄花鸟、黄冠啄花鸟等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 蘇門答臘島
nodes.summary: 蘇門答臘島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括罗氏山鹧鸪、蘇門答臘山鷓鴣、長嘴山鶉等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sumatran flowerpecker
nodes.summary: The Sumatran flowerpecker (Dicaeum beccarii) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae that is found in montane Sumatra. It was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the fire-breasted flowerpecker (Dicaeum ignipectus). Taxonomy The Sumatran flowerpecker was formally described in 1916 by the British zoologists Herbert C. Robinson and C. Boden Kloss based on three specimens that they had collected on Mount Kerinci on the island of Sumatra in Indonesia. They coined the binomial name Dicaeum beccarii. They chose the specific epithet to honour the Italian botanist and explorer Odoardo Beccari. The Sumatran flowerpecker was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the fire-breasted flowerpecker (Dicaeum ignipectus) but based on differences in plumage, it is now treated as a separate species. It is monotypic: no subspecies are recognised. References
